page_content: INST681 Health Information Behavior (3 Credits) Exploration of information needs of healthcare professionals and the general public, as well as how they seek information to fulﬁll these information needs, impacts and outcomes of health-related information- seeking by multiple populations. Examination of models and theories and empirical studies of patient and healthcare professional information behavior. Prerequisite: INFM600; or LBSC602; or permission of instructor. Restriction: Permission of INFO-College of Information Studies.
